overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit dystopian urban environment. The player character moves from a wide street beneath elevated highways, through a covered underpass with holographic displays, into a narrow commercial alley with Japanese signage, and finally approaches a street intersection with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide cyberpunk street beneath elevated highway with large digital billboards

events.description: pedestrian passes close by on the right sidewalk, temporarily blocking view
black car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk of a wide neon-lit street, passing large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking on the sidewalk in the opposite direction, wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: large red neon sign on building facade spelling 'CALIENTE'
massive horizontal digital screen spanning across the street displaying advertisements
tall vertical digital screen mounted on the right building showing colorful ads
elevated highway structure running overhead with support columns visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk street at night, dominated by the red 'CALIENTE' neon sign on the left and massive digital billboards overhead. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian walking the opposite way, while vehicles occasionally drive past on the multi-lane road. The atmosphere is distinctly dystopian with mixed industrial and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with concrete support pillars

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the highway overpass, lighting becomes dimmer
passing a glowing holographic statue on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the dimly lit concrete corridor beneath the highway

entered.detail: thick cylindrical concrete columns supporting the highway overhead
glowing white holographic projection of a robed figure resembling a Buddha or Jizo statue
scattered newspapers and trash debris covering the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway beneath the highway overpass, where thick concrete pillars line the path and the ground is littered with debris. A distinctive holographic statue glows on the right side, providing an eerie illumination in the otherwise dim underpass. The environment feels enclosed and gritty compared to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with closed storefronts and Japanese neon signage

events.description: entering narrow alleyway lined with shop fronts and neon signs
passing bright green neon signs increases local illumination with teal glow

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor lined with shuttered shops and glowing signage

entered.detail: green neon sign with Japanese characters '営業中' indicating business is open
closed corrugated metal shutters of various shops along the right wall
vertical strips of green neon lighting running along the building facade
distinctive orange-yellow textured tactile paving covering the walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow commercial alleyway with distinctive orange tactile paving underfoot. Closed shop fronts with metal shutters line the right side, illuminated by vibrant green neon signs including Japanese text indicating open businesses. The corridor feels intimate and cyberpunk with the contrast of dark shadows and bright neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and approaching crosswalk

events.description: exiting narrow alley to wider street approaching an intersection
teal colored sedan approaches from left and stops at red traffic light
pedestrian begins crossing the street at the crosswalk ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the street intersection, observing traffic signals and waiting pedestrians

notable_agents.action: teal sedan driving along the street and stopping at the red traffic light
crossing the multi-lane street at the designated crosswalk

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with text 'FOR MY BEAUTY' in white and pink lighting
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface
black metal bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a wider urban intersection as the camera exits the narrow alley. A prominent 'FOR MY BEAUTY' neon sign stands on the right, while a distinctive teal sedan stops at the red traffic light ahead. The camera approaches the crosswalk where a pedestrian is crossing, with street bollards lining the sidewalk and traffic signals overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit dystopian city, moving from a wide industrial thoroughfare into a gritty underpass and narrow alley before emerging at a busy intersection. It begins on a broad street dominated by massive digital billboards and a red Caliente sign, passing pedestrians and vehicles amidst a mix of modern and industrial architecture. As the camera moves forward, the open space gives way to a covered walkway beneath a highway overpass, where the atmosphere becomes enclosed and dim, illuminated by a glowing holographic statue beside concrete pillars and debris. The scene then shifts into a narrow commercial alleyway with orange tactile paving, where the environment feels intimate and shadowed, punctuated by vibrant green neon signs and Japanese text. Finally, the corridor opens back up into a wider urban intersection, passing a For My Beauty sign toward a teal sedan stopped at a red light and a pedestrian crossing the street.
